title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at LinkedIn Learning India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at LinkedIn Learning India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
LinkedIn Learning India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LinkedIn Learning India:
LinkedIn Learning India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LinkedIn Learning India!
